modelIdentification.name: JLVC-PhysicalEntity
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-PhysicalEntity provides Physical Entity components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the objects necessary for Physical Entity communication in the JLVC Federation.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of JLVC Modular FOM.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 1.

JLVC2024 - Version 2: Added JUtrackInfo, attribute to JLVC_Aircraft, JLVC_GroundVehicle, JLVC_SubmersibleVessel, and JLVC_SurfaceVessel. Created JTIDSunitTrackInfoStruct and JTIDSunitTrackNumber15bitStruct fixed record dataTypes. Create JTIDSUnitNumberNumericEnum8 enumerated dataType.
JLVC2025 - Version 3: Updated semantics for JTIDSunitTrackNumber field
JLVC2025 - Version 4: Added TowedBy attribute to JLVC_Spacecraft, JLVC_Munition, and JLVC_Expendables. Added isTowed attribute to JLVC_Supplies.
JLVC2025 - Version 5: Updated JTIDSUnitNumberNumericEnum8 enumerator names to be compliant with schema.

JLVC2026 - Version 6: Updated JLVCIsPartOf semantics for JLVC object leaves. Removed old RPRnotes. Removed PeriscopeUp and SnorkelUp from JLVC_SubmersibleVessel, as RPR3 has added equivalent attributes in SubmersibleVessel. Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Physical FOM Module

objectClass.name: JLVC_Aircraft
objectClass.semantics: Aircraft published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An unique identifier specified by the OBS xml file.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the object instance is being towed (true) or not (false)

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the entity is not in disguise and the AlternateEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FiringStatus
attribute.semantics: Active state of gunfire typically used to trigger visual gunfire animations.

attribute.name: CallSign
attribute.semantics: Entity call sign.

attribute.name: ATOandMissionNumber
attribute.semantics: ATO identifier and aircraft mission number

attribute.name: IntelState
attribute.semantics: supports Enhanced Threat Communications Design

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: Concealed
attribute.semantics: Describes whether an aircraft is concealed.

attribute.name: JUtrackInfo
attribute.semantics: JUtrackNumber and associated LVCIDs.

objectClass.name: JLVC_GroundVehicle
objectClass.semantics: GroundVehicle published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An unique identifier specified by the OBS xml file.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the object instance is being towed (true) or not (false)

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the entity is not in disguise and the AlternateEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FiringStatus
attribute.semantics: Active state of gunfire typically used to trigger visual gunfire animations.

attribute.name: CallSign
attribute.semantics: the object's callsign

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: JUtrackInfo
attribute.semantics: JUtrackNumber and associated LVCIDs.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Spacecraft
objectClass.semantics: Spacecraft published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An unique identifier specified by the OBS xml file.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates whether object is towed.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: the federate publishing the object

attribute.name: CallSign
attribute.semantics: Entity call sign

attribute.name: NumberBoostersDropped
attribute.semantics: Indicates which stage of flyout (how many boosters have been jettisoned) the main body of a ballistic missile is in.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: JLVC_SubmersibleVessel
objectClass.semantics: SubmersibleVessel published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An unique identifier specified by the OBS xml file.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the object instance is being towed (true) or not (false)

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the entity is not in disguise and the AlternateEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FiringStatus
attribute.semantics: Active state of gunfire typically used to trigger visual gunfire animations.

attribute.name: CallSign
attribute.semantics: the object's callsign

attribute.name: NumberBoostersDropped
attribute.semantics: Indicates which stage of flyout (how many boosters have been jettisoned) the main body of a ballistic missile is in.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: SeaLinkSconum
attribute.semantics: SCONUM attribute for a SEALINK-identified merchant ship.

attribute.name: SeaLinkTonnage
attribute.semantics: Gross tonnage for a SEALINK-identified merchant ship.

attribute.name: SeaLinkUprights
attribute.semantics: Uprights string (the ship profile expressed in characters) for a SEALINK-identified merchant ship.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: JUtrackInfo
attribute.semantics: JUtrackNumber and associated LVCIDs.

objectClass.name: JLVC_SurfaceVessel
objectClass.semantics: SurfaceVessel published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An unique identifier specified by the OBS xml file.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the object instance is being towed (true) or not (false)

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the entity is not in disguise and the AlternateEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FiringStatus
attribute.semantics: Active state of gunfire typically used to trigger visual gunfire animations.

attribute.name: SeaLinkUprights
attribute.semantics: Uprights string (the ship profile expressed in characters) for a SEALINK-identified merchant ship.

attribute.name: SeaLinkTonnage
attribute.semantics: Gross tonnage for a SEALINK-identified merchant ship.

attribute.name: SeaLinkSconum
attribute.semantics: SCONUM attribute for a SEALINK-identified merchant ship.

attribute.name: AftPortApproachSequencedIntensity
attribute.semantics: AftPortApproachSequenced lighting intensity (0 = off)

attribute.name: AftPortApproachSteadyIntensity
attribute.semantics: AftPortApproachSteady lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: AftStarboardApproachSteadyIntensity
attribute.semantics: AftStarboardApproachSteady lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: AmberStatusLightIntensity
attribute.semantics: AmberStatusLight lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: CAIBallsFLOLSIntensity
attribute.semantics: CAIBallsFLOLS lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: CAICutGreenFLOLSIntensity
attribute.semantics: CAICutGreenFLOLS lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: CAIDatumsFLOLSIntensity
attribute.semantics: CAIDatumsFLOLS lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: DeckEdgeIntensity
attribute.semantics: DeckEdge lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: DropLineLRLUIntensity
attribute.semantics: DropLineLRLU lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: FwdPortApproachSequencedIntensity
attribute.semantics: FwdPortApproachSequenced lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: FwdPortApproachSteadyIntensity
attribute.semantics: FwdPortApproachSteady lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: FwdStarboardApproachSequencedIntensity
attribute.semantics: FwdStarboardApproachSequenced lighting intesity (0 = off).

attribute.name: FwdStarboardApproachSteadyIntensity
attribute.semantics: FwdStarboardApproachSteady lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: GreenStatusLightIntensity
attribute.semantics: GreenStatusLight lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: HARSIntensity
attribute.semantics: HARS lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: HIFRIntensity
attribute.semantics: HIFR lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: HPIIntensity
attribute.semantics: HPI lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: HeloSpotsIntensity
attribute.semantics: HeloSpots lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: IslandNumberIntensity
attribute.semantics: IslandNumber lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: ObstructionLightsIntensity
attribute.semantics: ObstructionLights lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: PositionLightsIntensity
attribute.semantics: PositionLights lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: RedStatusLightIntensity
attribute.semantics: RedStatusLight lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: SGSIIntensity
attribute.semantics: SGSI lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: VERTREPIntensity
attribute.semantics: VERTREP ligthing intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: WaveoffLightsIntensity
attribute.semantics: WaveoffLights lighting intensity (0 = off).

attribute.name: CallSign
attribute.semantics: the object's callsign

attribute.name: PeriscopeUp
attribute.semantics: Whether the entity\'s periscope is up or not.

attribute.name: SnorkelUp
attribute.semantics: Whether the entity\'s snorkel is up or not.

attribute.name: NumberBoostersDropped
attribute.semantics: Indicates which stage of flyout (how many boosters have been jettisoned) the main body of a ballistic missile is in.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: JUtrackInfo
attribute.semantics: JUtrackNumber and associated LVCIDs.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Human
objectClass.semantics: Human published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An unique identifier specified by the OBS xml file.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the entity is not in disguise and the AlternateEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FiringStatus
attribute.semantics: Active state of gunfire typically used to trigger visual gunfire animations.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons

attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: JLVC_NonHuman
objectClass.semantics: NonHuman published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: unique identifier for entities in the JLVC federation, a.k.a. UGUID, OBSID, JUGSID, etc.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior. This attribute is optional.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the entity is not in disguise and the AlternateEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: FiringStatus
attribute.semantics: Active state of gunfire typically used to trigger visual gunfire animations.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons

attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: An identifier specified by the OBS application xml file consisting of 11 characters.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute specifying the side to which the object instance belongs.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: A pointer to the object's superior.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value identifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates whether object is being towed

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Munition
objectClass.semantics: Munition published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: NumberBoostersDropped
attribute.semantics: Indicates which stage of flyout (how many boosters have been jettisoned) the main body of a ballistic missile is in.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates whether entity is being towed

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: unique identifier for entities in the JLVC federation, a.k.a. UGUID, OBSID, JUGSID, etc.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the entity that owns the munition.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: [Optional] Name of the Side that owns this munition.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the munition.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Expendables
objectClass.semantics: Countermeasure devices with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: unique identifier for entities in the JLVC federation, a.k.a. UGUID, OBSID, JUGSID, etc

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value identifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates whether object is being towed

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: NumberBoostersDropped
attribute.semantics: Indicates which stage of flyout (how many boosters have been jettisoned) the main body of a ballistic missile is in.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: ReferenceEntityIdentifier
attribute.semantics: This identifies the entity responsible for deploying the expendable.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the expendable.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Radio
objectClass.semantics: Electronic devices for the communication of both audio and data, operated by entities belonging to armed forces.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: unique identifier for entities in the JLVC federation, a.k.a. UGUID, OBSID, JUGSID, etc.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates object is towed

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: [Optional] Name of the Side that owns this radio.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the entity that is the parent of this entity.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: AcousticGainControl
attribute.semantics: Automatic gain control of the sonobuoy hydrophone. This is an optional attribute and should only be provided if the sonobuoy has an AGC capability.

attribute.name: OperationalMode
attribute.semantics: The operational mode of the sonobuoy and its sensor. The values this enumeration may take are dependent upon the sonobuoy type. This is an optional attribute, and should only be provided if the operational mode of the sonobuoy may be altered.

attribute.name: Payload
attribute.semantics: The number of acoustic charges or stores available on the sonobuoy.

attribute.name: ProcessingBand
attribute.semantics: The processing band of the sonobuoy. This is an optional attribute and only should be provided if the sonobuoy type represented has a selectable processing band.

attribute.name: RFChannel
attribute.semantics: RF Group that this sonobouy receives commands on.

attribute.name: SonicChannel
attribute.semantics: Sonic frequency that the Sonobuoy pings the environment

attribute.name: UplinkEnabled
attribute.semantics: Indicates if bouy is transmitting reports.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: unique identifier for entities in the JLVC federation, a.k.a. UGUID, OBSID, JUGSID, etc.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: JLVC_Sensor
objectClass.semantics: Sensor published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates whether object is towed

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: unique identifier for entities in the JLVC federation, a.k.a. UGUID, OBSID, JUGSID, etc.

attribute.name: PeriscopeUp
attribute.semantics: Whether the entity\'s periscope is up or not.

attribute.name: SnorkelUp
attribute.semantics: Whether the entity\'s snorkel is up or not.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: NumberBoostersDropped
attribute.semantics: Indicates which stage of flyout (how many boosters have been jettisoned) the main body of a ballistic missile is in.

attribute.name: SeparationParentEntityId
attribute.semantics: For jettisoned missile components (tank/boosters) indicated which main missile assembly the component was jettisoned from.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: [Optional] Name of the Side that owns this sensor.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the entity that is the parent of this entity.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: LVCID
attribute.semantics: [Mandatory] unique LVCID that identifies this object in the federation.

attribute.name: SideName
attribute.semantics: [Optional] Name of the Side that owns this supply.

attribute.name: MySuperior
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the entity that dropped the supply to make the cache.

attribute.name: publisher
attribute.semantics: Value indentifies the particular federate that is currently publishing this entity.

attribute.name: AlternateForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity is Disguised as. A value of Other is used to indicate the Entity is not in Disguise and the AlternatedEntityType attribute is meaningless.

attribute.name: TowedBy
attribute.semantics: [Optional] LVCID of the towing entity (ie. Who is pulling). If the value is empty, then no entity is pulling the entity.

attribute.name: isTowed
attribute.semantics: indicates whether object is being towed

attribute.name: JLVCIsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

objectClass.name: SurfaceInstallation
objectClass.semantics: requested by Diann Smith on 18 April 2012

simpleData.name: LightIntensityCandelaFloat32
simpleData.semantics: an SI base unit, luminous flux per unit solid angle

enumeratedData.name: JTIDSUnitNumberNumericEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Numeric character of a JU Track Number.

enumeratedData.name: SonobuoyAGCEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Defines the AGC mode of the sonobuoy.

enumeratedData.name: SonobuoyModeEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Describes the operation mode of the sonobuoy.

enumeratedData.name: SonobuoyBandEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: The sonobuoy acoustic processing frequency band.

fixedRecordData.name: ATOMissionNumberStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The ATO identifier and mission number for a particular air mission

field.name: ATOIdentifier
field.semantics: The ATO Identifier of the air mission. Default value is -1 and should be used if the air mission is not on the ATO or the ATO number is unknown.

field.name: MissionNumber
field.semantics: The mission number of the air mission

fixedRecordData.name: JTIDSunitTrackInfoStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: JU track number and associated LVCIDs

field.name: JTIDSunitTrackNumber
field.semantics: JU track number. A 5-digit number, where each digit is 0 to 7. A value of 00000 is specified in the 6016 Standard for use as No Statement and will be used as the default or empty value of this field. Legal track number are 00001-07776 and 10000-77776, with the following exceptions: 1. Values 00077 and 07777 are illegal values according in 6016 Standard. 2. Value 00176 is reserved for use as the pseudo source track number address.

field.name: EntitiesAssociatedwithTrackNumber
field.semantics: Optional. List of additional entities that will be represented by JUtrackNumber. Do not include the LVCID of this object.

field.name: Field1
field.semantics: First character of track number. Numeric.

field.name: Field2
field.semantics: Second character of track number. Numeric.

field.name: Field3
field.semantics: Third character of track number. Numeric.

field.name: Field4
field.semantics: Fourth character of track number. Numeric.

field.name: Field5
field.semantics: Fifth character of track number. Numeric.
